build_system: CMake 3.22 with GCC 11.5. Compiler options include -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wsign-conversion. No external library installation possible (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network).
test_framework: doctest (header-only, vendored in third_party/doctest/include/doctest/doctest.h). Single test binary at build/tests/threatone_tests. 1053 tests currently passing.
verification_instructions: 1. Run cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF 2. Run cmake --build build 3. cd build && ctest --output-on-failure 4. Confirm all 1053+ tests pass
setup_instructions: No setup needed. CMake 3.22 and GCC 11.5 are pre-installed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot download packages, libraries, or external dependencies. All implementations must be written from scratch in C/C++. No Qt available (ENABLE_QT=OFF). No OpenSSL, YARA, libsodium, or zstd available.
contribution_requirements: C++20 with modern idioms. RAII for resource management. Result<T,E> for error handling. Thread-safe by default. Each module has its own CMakeLists.txt. Header-only third-party deps in third_party/.
key_patterns: Result<T,E> pattern for errors (core/Error.h). ModuleLogger for logging (wraps spdlog::logger). ConnectionManager uses sqlite3 C API via prepared statements. YaraEngine has #ifdef HAS_YARA for real vs stub paths. CryptoUtils has #ifdef HAS_OPENSSL/#ifdef HAS_LIBSODIUM with XOR fallback. Platform drivers use #ifdef __linux__/#ifdef _WIN32/#ifdef __APPLE__.
directory_structure: Root: CMakeLists.txt, src/ (30+ modules), tests/ (matching test dirs), third_party/ (doctest, spdlog, sqlite, nlohmann), cmake/ (build helpers). Each src module: include/<module>/*.h, src/*.cpp, CMakeLists.txt.
